disabled_band_reduction_scheme.name: Disabled Band Reduction Scheme
disabled_band_reduction_scheme.description: Reduces your Council Tax bill by one band if your home has been adapted to meet the needs of a disabled person.
eligibility_criteria: A room (other than a bathroom, kitchen or toilet) which is used mainly by the disabled person
Enough space for the use of a wheelchair
disabled_band_reduction_scheme.benefit: Your Council Tax bill is calculated as if your home was in the next lower valuation band.

severely_mentally_impaired_discount.name: Severely Mentally Impaired (SMI) Discount/Exemption
severely_mentally_impaired_discount.description: Exemption or discount for people who are 'severely mentally impaired'.
severely_mentally_impaired_discount.eligibility: Must be certified by a doctor as having a severe impairment of intelligence and social functioning which appears to be permanent, and be entitled to certain benefits (e.g. DLA middle or high rate care, PIP daily living).

single_person_discount.name: Single Person Discount
single_person_discount.description: A discount for households where only one adult lives.
single_person_discount.eligibility: Only one person aged 18 or over lives in the property.
single_person_discount.benefit: 25% reduction in the Council Tax bill.

council_tax_reduction.name: Council Tax Reduction (CTR)
council_tax_reduction.description: A means-tested benefit to help people on low incomes pay their Council Tax.
council_tax_reduction.eligibility: Low income, receiving benefits, or of pension age. Each local council has its own scheme.
council_tax_reduction.note: Can reduce the bill by up to 100% depending on the local authority's rules.

disabled_facilities_grant.name: Disabled Facilities Grant (DFG)
disabled_facilities_grant.description: A grant to help with the cost of home adaptations so a disabled person can continue to live at home.
eligible_works: Improving access to rooms and facilities (e.g. stairlifts, level access showers)
disabled_facilities_grant.means_tested: Yes (except for children under 18 in England and Wales).

blue_badge_scheme.name: Blue Badge Scheme
blue_badge_scheme.description: Provides parking concessions for people with severe mobility problems or certain other disabilities.
blue_badge_scheme.eligibility: Includes those with PIP (8 points or more in 'moving around' or 'planning and following a journey' descriptors), DLA (higher rate mobility), or registered blind.

disabled_persons_bus_pass.name: Disabled Person's Bus Pass
disabled_persons_bus_pass.description: Provides free off-peak travel on local buses.
disabled_persons_bus_pass.eligibility: Based on disability criteria set by the local authority, including those receiving DLA/PIP mobility elements.

access_card.name: Access Card (Nimbus Card)
access_card.description: A card for disabled people that acts as proof of disability and communicates specific needs to venues via simple icons.
benefits: Easier application for 'Essential Companion' tickets (often free)
Proof of need for 'Standing and Queuing' support
Widely recognised by major UK venues (theatres, festivals, theme parks)
Eliminates the need to carry sensitive medical documents
